name: image-attachment
_note: An image attachment event. image.attach is listed in RawHermesEventName but has NO classifier branch yet, so it currently classifies as unsupported (carrying a sanitized payload). This is a GAP feature 19 will close. Locked here as honest current behavior; the replay test asserts unsupported with rawType set so the event is never silently dropped.
